title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Yes Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Yes Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Yes Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Yes Bank:
Yes Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank!
